description: Retrieve information about a Campaign from Mandiant

outputs.description: The name of the Campaign MANDIANTTI.Campaign.fields.actors The Threat Actors associated with the Campaign
outputs.name: MANDIANTTI.Campaign.value

outputs.description: The description of the Campaign MANDIANTTI.Campaign.fields.tags The industries associated with the Campaign
outputs.name: MANDIANTTI.Campaign.fields.description

outputs.description: The title of a report associated with the Campaign MANDIANTTI.Campaign.fields.publications.link The link to the report in Mandiant Advantage
outputs.name: MANDIANTTI.Campaign.fields.publications.title
